title: polypodium suboligolepidum
intro: Polypodium suboligolepidum, also known as the Chinese polypody fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the Polypodiaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Polypodium suboligolepidum include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and improving cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, decoctions, and infusions, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
